records.description: Small cut on left hand from conduit deburring
records.corrective_action: Replaced worn deburring tool, reinforced PPE protocol

records.description: Ladder shifted on uneven surface at Lakeside project
records.corrective_action: Added ladder leveling check to pre-task safety brief

records.description: Unexpected live circuit encountered during panel swap
records.corrective_action: Updated LOTO verification procedure, added second-person verification step

records.description: Heat-related dizziness during outdoor conduit run
records.treatment: Rest and hydration, returned to work after 45 minutes
records.corrective_action: Adjusted summer work schedule, mandatory hydration breaks every 30 minutes in heat advisories

records.description: Dropped 4-foot section of rigid conduit from scaffold
records.corrective_action: Installed tool tethering on scaffold work, added hard hat zone marking
